entities.name: SWEET POTATO
entities.description: The crop species Ipomoea batatas L. evaluated for yield and stability

entities.name: BANGLADESH
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: GAZIPUR
entities.description: One of the five testing regions in Bangladesh

entities.name: BOGURA
entities.description: One of the five testing regions in Bangladesh, identified as the best location for production

entities.name: JAMALPUR
entities.description: One of the five testing regions in Bangladesh

entities.name: JASHORE
entities.description: One of the five testing regions in Bangladesh

entities.name: CHATTOGRAM
entities.description: One of the five testing regions in Bangladesh

entities.name: ROOT YIELD
entities.description: The primary performance metric being evaluated across genotypes and environments

entities.name: STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of genotype performance across different environments

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL ADAPTABILITY
entities.description: The ability of genotypes to perform well in various environments

entities.name: RANDOMIZED COMPLETE BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used for the study

entities.name: FIXED AND RANDOM EFFECTS MODELS
entities.description: Statistical models used for analysis

entities.name: ANOVA
entities.description: Analysis of variance used to determine significant variation in root yield

entities.name: AMMI
entities.description: Additive and multiplicative interaction effect models used to confirm GEI variance

entities.name: LMM
entities.description: Linear mixed model used to analyze GEI variance and genotype selection

entities.name: BLUP INDEX
entities.description: Best linear unbiased prediction index used for genotype selection

entities.name: ASV
entities.description: AMMI stability value used to identify the most stable genotype

entities.name: IPCA ANALYSIS
entities.description: Interaction principal components axis analysis used to identify key testing sites

entities.name: WAAS BIPLOT
entities.description: Weighted average of absolute scores biplot used to identify the most stable variety

entities.name: MEGA-ENVIRONMENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to identify genotypes excelling in specific environmental groups

entities.name: GENOTYPE
entities.description: The genetic makeup of the sweet potato varieties being tested

entities.name: GEI VARIANCE
entities.description: Genotype by Environment Interaction variance

entities.name: SANDY LOAM SOIL
entities.description: The soil type found in Bogura

entities.name: AGRO-ECOLOGICAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: The various environmental conditions across the testing sites

entities.description: A high-performing sweet potato genotype with the highest storage root yield

entities.description: A high-performing and stable sweet potato genotype

entities.description: A high-performing sweet potato genotype

entities.description: A high-performing sweet potato genotype

entities.description: A high-performing sweet potato genotype

entities.description: A high-performing sweet potato genotype
